title: Fix installer port conflict TUI hang on confirm
acceptanceCriteria: Choosing a suggested port completes the prompt, writes the selected HAPPYTG_*_PORT override into the existing installer .env path, reruns preflight, and continues the install flow.
Choosing Enter custom port accepts a valid port, rejects invalid input with a product-level validation message, and continues without hanging.
Choosing Abort install exits the step predictably without hidden config changes or hangs.
Supported reuse behavior remains unchanged and does not trigger pointless port rebinding.
Deterministic regression coverage exercises the interactive path for suggested-port, manual-port, abort, and prompt completion so the hang is caught in tests.
